usd_reason: The dollar is rising because investors think US interest rates will go up
gold_reason: Higher US interest rates make gold less attractive to investors
indices_reason: The stock market is falling because of uncertainty about the new Federal Reserve leadership
lead_story: The new Federal Reserve chairman, Kevin Warsh, is making changes that are causing uncertainty in the markets, the dollar is rising to a one-year high, and stock market performance is suffering as a result, with the S&P 500 having its worst performance for a new Fed chair since 1994
